options.name: -distance
options.description: Specifies in microns, the distance to move the wire.

options.name: -dx
options.description: Specifies dx move, in microns, the distance to move the wire in x direction.

options.name: -dy
options.description: Specifies dy move, in microns, the distance to move the wire in y direction.

options.name: -to
options.description: Specifies the coordinate of destination, in microns.
